headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains In-Line on Quest Diagnostics, Lowers Price Target to $210
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Elizabeth Anderson   maintains Quest Diagnostics (NYSE:DGX) with a In-Line and lowers the price target from $220 to $210.
